images.alt: Askew in the earth is the sunken torii gate. White painted and the paint untarnished in defiance of the level sands that reach the vaulting sky and the clouds as if lightning forking through the heavens. Faces obscured by the kasagi is a row of black uniformed men. Another row is opposite.

Two monks in black dress walk on a path of floating verdure upon the golden waters surrounding a golden pavilion temple. Even the tall mountains of the region are flat and ornamental against the artistry of beauty wrought by hand.
Against a young man's face, a paramour's hand positions a pocket mirror to reflect her own visage upon his. Her aspect his own. All bathed in the pink neon of the city night.

Without fear or doubt in his face, a man kneeling and stripped of his uniform has steadied a knife at his abdomen. Tight around his head is a hachimaki invoking the loyalty of the samurai Kusunoki Masashige. Another man in full uniform holds in his youthful hands a katana gleaming just below the neck of the kneeling man.

We hit pause today.  
Not because things broke — but because we were moving too fast to notice what was actually working.  

Sometimes momentum hides insight.  
Sometimes slowing down reveals the next leap.  

How do you know when to pause vs. push?

We spent half the week polishing details no one will ever notice.  
Then realized the messier version actually felt more alive.  

Maybe it’s not about getting it perfect — just getting it real enough to connect.  

How do you know when to stop refining and just launch?

Auf rotem Hintergrund stehen übergroße gelbe Buchstaben, die das Wort „REPUBLIK“ bilden. Jeder Buchstabe wird von einer anderen Person mit einer Stange hochgehalten. Zu sehen sind verschiedene gesellschaftliche Gruppen: eine erschöpfte Pflegekraft, ein Lobbyist im Anzug mit Aktentasche „Lobby & Partner“, ein Soldat, ein Handwerker, ein Lieferdienstfahrer, ein älterer Bürger, eine junge Klimaaktivistin mit Schild „Klima schützen, Zukunft retten“ und ein wütender Mann mit Smartphone. Unten steht der Satz: „Sie tragen die Buchstaben der Republik – doch wer trägt die Demokratie?“ Das Bild wirkt wie eine satirische Kritik an der politischen und gesellschaftlichen Lage in Deutschland.

record.text:
The ChatGPT-goblins appeared as a result of model trainig biased towards a ”nerdy personality”. The governance and control of this is totally hidden from anyone other than the model maker. Remember this when models are incentivised to please a ”violent extremist” personality instead.
#openai #ai

images.alt: Why it matters Depending on who you ask, the goblins are a delightful or annoying quirk of the model. But they are also a powerful example of how reward signals can shape model behavior in unexpected ways, and how models can learn to generalize rewards in certain situations to unrelated ones. Taking the time to understand why a model is behaving in a strange way, and building out ways to investigate those patterns quickly, is an important capability for our research team. This investigation resulted in new tools for the research team to audit model behavior and fix behavior problems at their root.

record.bridgyOriginalText:
Coding #LLM's are receiving a lot of attention now, a marked change from the mass market #chatGPT era of "AI". This is poetic justice of sorts.

The general public has limited #digitalliteracy and agency. Technical communities can better "dogfood" their own creations and now they are doing it.

So while attitudes towards coding LLM's vary from hyperventilating euphoria to apocalyptically-tinted rejection, it seems the verdict on utility, tradeoffs, adverse effects etc. will come much sooner.

record.text: Ahh I missed it was editor feedback but yeah I didn't mean my posing my response in the form of options to imply that you had made a choice here. Just expressing the degree to which I would prefer not to receive anything produced by an LLM lol

LLMs are not our peers. They cannot do peer review. They cannot do analysis. They cannot do anything except produce the appearance of having done. I'd rather a human cast yarrow sticks or bones and write their reviews from that, at least human conduct would then be central and accountable.

yeah if I have to choose between someone using an LLM in the reviewing of my work and taking additional time (years are fine by me) then I would choose the latter.

Hasbro have apparently hired a notorious union-busting firm in response to the Magic the Gathering Arena teams attempt at unionisation  - Reddit mods have deleted the post 

If you haven't please sign the unions petition 
actionnetwork.org/forms/uwotcl...

images.alt:
A Reddit Post

Hasbro just hired a notorious union-busting firm
News
I've been tracking the NLRB filing for the new Arena Union (UWOTC-CWA) since they announced on Monday. The devs gave Hasbro until this Friday (International workers day) to voluntarily recognize them.
In response, Hasbro hired a well known union busting firm Fisher Phillips, to oversee this debacle.

images.alt:
»Kamui-san Directly Behind You« entsteht bei Zero-G × ZG-R unter der Regie von Takumi Tsukumo, die Series Composition übernimmt Motofumi Nakajō, das Character Design stammt von Toshinari Yamashita (Divergence Eve), das Sub Character Design übernimmt Nana Hiiragi, die Chief Animation Direction liegt bei Takayuki Noguchi und Tomoyuki Abe, die Soundregie übernehmen Shūhei Abe und Nankaiteiō und die Musik komponiert Chihiro Endō.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Shizuka ist eine normale Oberschülerin, die Geister sehen kann und sie magisch anzuziehen scheint. Weil das allein ziemlich gefährlich ist, arbeitet sie als Assistentin für den berühmten Spirituellen Kamui. Der ist zwar extrem selbstsicher, doch seine Methode, Geister auszutreiben, ist alles andere als gewöhnlich. Zusammen geraten die beiden immer wieder in bizarre, übernatürliche Situationen.

images.alt:
📜 Beschreibung 》
Der einzige Lichtblick im tristen Arbeitsalltag des mittelalten Sasaki ist das freundliche Lächeln von Yamada, einer Kassiererin im 24-Stunden-Supermarkt, den er regelmäßig besucht. Doch eines Abends verpasst er ihre Schicht und trifft hinter dem Laden auf die provokante und geheimnisvolle Tayama, die ihn kurzerhand zum gemeinsamen Rauchen einlädt. Zwischen neckischen Kommentaren und Zigarettenpausen entsteht eine unerwartete Nähe, während Sasaki nun aus gleich zwei Gründen im Supermarkt auftaucht. Mit jeder Begegnung zeigt sich, dass hinter Tayamas spielerischem Auftreten mehr steckt, als es zunächst scheint. Eine leise, erwachsene Geschichte über Einsamkeit, kleine Fluchten und unerwartete Verbindungen beginnt.

»Obata« von Rikuya Yasuda
»Maezawa« von Yōko Hikasa
